title: No More Post Beta Flowers
description: Remove 1.7 and 1.14 flowers from the world generation.
body:
Replace 1.7 and 1.14 flowers with the poppy and dandelion (rose and flower in beta Minecraft).

This includes blocks like Sweet Berry Bush, Blue Orchid, Allium,  Azure Bluet, Tulips, Oxeye Daisy, Cornflower, Lily of the Valley, Sunflower, and more.

Pink Petals are not removed as they are a critical part of the biome Cherry Groves and can only spawn there.

Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/MvrwfmMcud).
